prompt: I want to add a simple custom field to the Item record and a basic workflow to notify the warehouse manager when a field is changed. This is a brand new NetSuite account with no legacy data. What is the plan?
assertions: Recommends Tier 3 classification and explains why (isolated field + single workflow is a tiny enhancement)
Identifies Greenfield origin because there is no legacy data or system to migrate
Explicitly asks for user confirmation before proceeding
Mentions the simplified 3-folder structure (Discovery_Design, Build_Test, Deployment)
Mentions a 1-page functional spec rather than a full BRD
